name: MOLECULAR TEMPLAT.DL-,001
summary: Molecular Templates, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering and developing targeted biologic therapeutics, known as engineered toxin bodies (ETBs), for the treatment of cancer. The company's ETB platform combines the unique advantages of targeted antibodies with the potent, cell-killing activity of bacterial toxins to create novel cancer therapies. Molecular Templates is headquartered in Austin, Texas.
